title: Batrachium nipponicum

The plant is a type of aquatic herb that is typically found in freshwater environments. Its classification is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, clade Commelinids, order Alismatales, family Potamogetonaceae, genus Batrachium, species B. nipponicum.
